subject: Re: Live Musician — Sunset Sessions & Ambient | Summer 2026
body_html:
Thank you for getting back to me. Here is my full application.

Profile
I'm a multi-instrumentalist and sound journey facilitator based in Italy, performing live with RAV Vast (endorsed artist), acoustic guitar, live looping, and Ableton. My sets range from deep meditative sound baths to layered ambient-electronic journeys — built live, no pre-recorded tracks.

Experience

  • 4-year residency at Villa Porta (luxury hotel, Lake Maggiore) — sunset ceremonies for international guests, renewed annually
  • Solo main stage at Drishti Beats Festival — Snowmass Village (Aspen), Colorado. Stage photo from audience
  • Greece's Got Talent — 4 YES from all judges (clip)
  • RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
  • Guest appearance in IHF's main stage set at Drishti (invited to play RAV)

Videos

  • Efthymia — solo RAV Vast sound journey (meditative, 6 min)
  • Transcendence — RAV Solo → organic house journey (ceremony to dance, 3 min)

Languages
English, Italian, Brazilian Portuguese, basic Spanish.

Equipment
Fully self-contained. 2 RAV Vasts, acoustic guitar, Ableton Push 3, drum pad, synth. DI-ready, plugs into any house system.

References
Work references from Villa Porta hotel management and Drishti Beats Festival organizers available on request.

Links
Instagram · Linktree

Available for extended stays. Happy to adapt to your programming format.

Best,
Alessio
body_text:
Thank you for getting back to me. Here is my full application.

Profile
I'm a multi-instrumentalist and sound journey facilitator based in Italy, performing live with RAV Vast (endorsed artist), acoustic guitar, live looping, and Ableton. My sets range from deep meditative sound baths to layered ambient-electronic journeys — built live, no pre-recorded tracks.

Experience
- 4-year residency at Villa Porta (luxury hotel, Lake Maggiore) — sunset ceremonies for international guests, renewed annually
- Solo main stage at Drishti Beats Festival — Snowmass Village (Aspen), Colorado
- Greece's Got Talent — 4 YES from all judges
- RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
- Guest appearance in IHF's main stage set at Drishti (invited to play RAV)

Videos
- Efthymia — solo RAV Vast sound journey (https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4)
- Transcendence — RAV Solo → organic house journey (https://youtu.be/q1mTTMnQCvo)

Languages
English, Italian, Brazilian Portuguese, basic Spanish.

Equipment
Fully self-contained. 2 RAV Vasts, acoustic guitar, Ableton Push 3, drum pad, synth. DI-ready, plugs into any house system.

References
Work references from Villa Porta hotel management and Drishti Beats Festival organizers available on request.

Links
Instagram: https://instagram.com/flutur_8
Linktree: https://linktr.ee/flutur

Available for extended stays. Happy to adapt to your programming format.

Best,
Alessio
designNotes: They asked for 'full applications with all relevant work reference letters and certification'
Positioned as 'sound journey facilitator' — their language, not 'musician'
Efthymia + Transcendence = the two videos that map to their ceremony format
References 'available on request' — buys time to get Drishti letter if user decides to pursue
Extended stays = key for Bali venues (they want residents, not fly-ins)
They're 'fully staffed' — this is a pipeline play, not an immediate booking
NO fee mentioned — they didn't ask, and for Bali wellness the conversation comes later
Drishti IG posts: main stage photo + audience view photo — visual proof
IHF guest appearance = social proof of peer respect in the festival circuit

venueContext.name: Pyramids of Chi
venueContext.vibe: Sacred geometry pyramids, sound healing, meditation ceremonies
